sections.heading: Configurable workflow corridor
sections.primary_message: One page explains the workflow, trust posture, and package story without presenter narration.

sections.heading: Canonical corridor
sections.primary_message: Stages and ownership transitions come first.

sections.heading: Persona visibility matrix
sections.primary_message: Buyers and operators see the same corridor through different proof priorities.

sections.heading: Scenario overlays
sections.primary_message: Segment, package, and operating-model overlays change the baseline without hiding the workflow.

sections.heading: Proof rail
sections.primary_message: Observed, inferred, and hypothesis-level claims are visually distinct.

sections.heading: Terminal outcomes
sections.primary_message: The page ends with the customer-facing outcome and KPI it supports.

proof_rail.label: Structured intake evidence
proof_rail.summary: Reusable ProductOS artifacts are the source of truth for the corridor.

proof_rail.label: Ownership transition observability
proof_rail.summary: Watch states stay visible while customer outcome proof remains bounded.

governance_signals.label: PM to Operations handoff
governance_signals.summary: The handoff is visible and intentionally bounded.

terminal_outcomes.label: Externally shareable confidence
terminal_outcomes.summary: Customers can understand the workflow and trust posture without narration.
